subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Remembered One maketh mention of thee from this Station which God hath made the point of circumambulation for the denizens of the Most Exalted Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک المذکور فی هذا المقام الذی جعله الله مطاف اهل الفردوس الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
